lines.text: The connections are forming. Three correct answers and the dungeon begins to take you seriously.
A rhythm builds. The dungeon has a rhythm too — it is waiting to see if yours outlasts it.
Something stirs in the lower levels. Three correct answers have a resonance that reaches deep.
The connections flow through you now. You are not studying. You are remembering.
Five in a row. The chains sing. Something ancient stirs — it recognizes mastery.
Five consecutive truths. The dungeon adjusts its calibration. You are no longer being tested by the version it prepared.
The Creature Below has not seen a streak this long in some time. It is paying closer attention than usual.
This is what the dungeon was built for — to find someone who reaches this state. It finds one, perhaps, in a generation.
The rhythm shatters. Down here, hesitation is a wound.
You falter. The walls lean closer.
The chain breaks. The dungeon recalibrates — it had been adjusting upward, now it remembers you are mortal.
The first correct answer. The descent has begun in earnest.
The archive opens one page. A beginning — no more, no less.
Wrong. And wrong again. The dungeon collects your errors with the same care it gives to your correct answers. The archive of failures is no smaller than the archive of truths.
The pattern of mistakes is itself information. The dungeon reads it. Considers what it says about what comes next.
